name: Title: Crunchy Peanut Butter Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add the sugar, milk, crunchy peanut butter, and vanilla to the pan. Stir frequently.
3. Cook over simmering water in the top half of a double boiler until the mixture thickens and becomes creamy, about 20-25 minutes.
4. Allow the frosting to cool slightly before using it to frost 4 eight-inch layers.
